title: HermitPermits
description: | it says pc In case it’s copyright so it’s permit craft | The HermitPermits in Hermitcraft Season 10!
body:
this is Hermitcrafts season 10 Hermit Permit texture pack!This uses custom model data so use the custom model data datapack or use these commands
Iron Permit data number: 1
/give @p paper[CustomModelData=1]
Gold permit Data Number: 2 
/give @p Paper[CustomModelData=2]
Diamond Permit Data Number: 3
/give @p Paper[CustomModelData=3]

if you got issues send a DM to @Joyedlion on discord
